name: Firebase Gate/Entrance
prompt:
Vietnam War firebase main gate/entrance. The controlled entry point to a forward operating base.

Physical structure:
- Gate posts: two heavy wooden posts (~0.25m square), ~3m tall, one on each side
  - ~4m apart (gate opening width)
- Crossbeam: horizontal beam across top connecting posts
- Gate barrier: horizontal wooden pole barrier that pivots up
  - Counter-weighted at one end
  - Currently shown in closed (horizontal) position across gap
  - Pivot point at one post
- Sandbag walls: extending from each post outward, ~1.5m tall
  - Each wall section ~3m long
  - Standard stacked sandbag construction
- Concertina wire: coiled razor wire on top of sandbag walls
  - Simplified as torus/ring shapes along wall tops
- Guard post: small sandbag enclosure on one side, ~1.5m x 1.5m
  - Like a miniature bunker next to the gate
- Sign: simple wooden sign board on crossbeam (blank or "FIREBASE" text placeholder - just the board)

Colors: Weathered wood (0x7B6B45), sandbags (0xc2a878), wire silver (0x999999), sign board (0x8B7355)
Orientation: Gate opening toward +Z (vehicles pass through along Z axis)
Scale: Real-world meters (~4m wide gate, ~3m tall, ~6m total width with walls)`,
    animations: `Gate barrier: pivots up 90 degrees and back down over 3 seconds (open/close cycle)`
  },
  {
    name: 'Ithaca 37 Shotgun',
    slug: 'ithaca37',
    category: 'weapons',
    assetCategory: 'prop',
    budget: 2000,
    prompt: `Vietnam War era Ithaca 37 pump-action shotgun. Used by tunnel rats and point men in dense jungle.

Physical structure (~0.95m total length):
- Receiver: smooth steel receiver body, bottom-ejecting (distinctive feature)
- Barrel: 20-inch barrel, smooth bore, no rib
  - Front bead sight at muzzle end
- Pump/slide: tubular forend that slides back and forth for pump action
  - Grooved wooden pump grip
- Stock: full wooden buttstock, smooth walnut
  - Rubber buttpad
- Trigger guard: steel loop around trigger
- Magazine tube: tubular magazine under barrel, extends nearly to muzzle
- Action bars: two thin bars connecting pump to bolt (visible between barrel and mag tube)
- No pistol grip - traditional stock configuration

Colors: Deep blued steel (0x1a1a2a), walnut wood (0x5C3317), lighter wood pump (0x6B4226), dark metal (0x222228)
Orientation: Lying flat, barrel along +Z, right side up
Scale: Real-world meters (~0.95m total length)
